parameters.query:
update ingestion.ingestion_runs
set
  status = 'completed',
  payload = payload || jsonb_build_object(
    'py_run_id', $1::text,
    'py_status', $2::text
  )
where run_id = $3::uuid;

INSERT INTO ingestion.ingestion_runs
(triggered_by, status, payload)
VALUES
(
  'n8n_local',
  'running',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'date_from', COALESCE($1::text, NULL),
    'date_to',   COALESCE($2::text, NULL)
  )
)
RETURNING
  run_id,
  $1::text AS date_from,
  $2::text AS date_to;

select
  count(*) filter (where decision = 'skipped_unchanged') as skipped_unchanged,
  count(*) filter (where decision = 'ingested') as ingested,
  count(*) filter (where decision = 'skip_missing') as skip_missing,
  count(*) filter (where decision = 'failed') as failed
from ingestion.file_history
where run_id = $1::uuid;
